title: chenopodium graveolens var. mexicanum
intro: Chenopodium graveolens var. mexicanum, also known as Mexican wormwood or Mexican pigweed, is a variety of the Chenopodium graveolens plant, which belongs to the amaranth family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Chenopodium graveolens var. mexicanum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can be used as a poultice or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
